title: libanotis pyrenaica var. libanotis
intro: Libanotis pyrenaica var. libanotis, also known as Pyrenean Mountain Mint or Pyrenean Angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, known for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to help with digestive issues, fever reduction, and skin problems. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and to aid in the treatment of wounds and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, Libanotis pyrenaica var. libanotis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
